attributes.action: Make A ICE (Immigration Customs Enforcement) In The United Kingdom
attributes.additional_details:
The streets are getting out of hand with crimes committed daily by illegal immigrants and others.
You put them in hotels that barely a British citizen can afford to stay in for a week this needs to stop NOW.
attributes.background:
Make A ICE (Immigration Customs Enforcement) In The United Kingdom. 

So ICE can deport immigrants from the United Kingdom back the there original country for back to a different country. 

We call upon the government to take this very seriously to make sure this is done properly.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what clear action which is not currently happening that you'd like the Government or Parliament to carry out.

The UK already has Immigration Enforcement (IE), which is an operational arm of the Home Office and responsible for removing people who have illegally entered the UK.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do in relation to immigration enforcement in the UK.
